result.title: MyFitnessPal: Calorie Counter
result.description:
Achieve your nutrition, calorie, macro & fitness goals with MyFitnessPal – the AI-powered food & fitness tracker with everything you need. Calories, macros, food, workouts – track it all in one place with one of the most comprehensive health, nutrition & fitness tracking apps available. Now with GLP-1 journey support - log doses and set reminders in the app.

Create personalized fitness & nutrition goals, build better habits around food, nutrition & calorie tracking and monitor your water intake. Download the app & start your free Premium trial today. With MyFitnessPal, you get food inspiration, an intermittent fasting tracker, science backed nutrition, and powerful fitness logging tools. MyFitnessPal is the #1 nutrition, macro & calorie tracking app in the U.S. – as featured in the New York Times, Forbes, the Today Show & U.S. News & World Report.

More than a calorie tracker & food journal – MyFitnessPal is an AI-powered health, nutrition & fitness platform built to help you track macros, monitor nutrition progress & crush your fitness goals.

NEW FEATURE: GLP-1 TRACKING
■ Log & track how you feel on your GLP-1 medications to spot patterns in your symptoms & side effects.
■ Stick to your schedule with custom reminders for your GLP-1 medication
■ Build healthy habits that actually stick with simple, effective nutrition & medication for tracking your GLP-1 journey

TRACK FOOD, CALORIES & MACROS WITH AI 
■ Log meals effortlessly from 20.5M+ foods, including restaurant dishes – nutrition & calorie tracking made simple 
■ Full nutrition & macro tracker breakdown – carbs, fat & protein – with custom targets for macros, protein, sodium, fiber & more 
■ Stay hydrated and support your nutrition goals with the built-in water tracker

FITNESS TRACKING, WORKOUTS & PROGRESS 
■ Log workouts & steps with the integrated fitness tracker to monitor health, nutrition & calorie burn 
■ Track calories, macros, nutrition stats & health insights at a glance or dive deep into the details 
■ See how fitness activity, nutrition & diet affect your daily calorie goals 
■ Wear OS support – calorie tracker, water tracker & macro tracker on your wrist for faster nutrition & fitness logging. Add complications to the home screen for faster fitness logging and the tile for tracking different nutrients at a glance

PERSONALIZED FITNESS PLANS & NUTRITION TOOLS 
■ Customize calorie, nutrition & fitness goals – weight loss, gain, maintenance, or performance 
■ Personalized nutrition & health dashboards – calorie, macro, fitness & diet stats all in one place 
■ Save meals & recipes for quick calorie, nutrition & macro logging 
■ Streamlined meal planner to simplify nutrition tracking & hit your calorie & macro targets 
■ Connect 40+ fitness trackers, smartwatches & health apps via one unified nutrition & fitness ecosystem 
■ Find friends & motivation in the MyFitnessPal health, nutrition & fitness community

PREMIUM 
■ Faster nutrition, calorie & macro tracking with barcode scan, meal scan & voice logging 
■ Customized macro, calorie & nutrition goals tailored to your fitness targets 
■ Ad-free logging with built-in nutrition insights & calorie & macro progress comparisons 
■ Net Carbs Mode – track net carbs across all food, nutrition & macro logs for keto and low-carb diets

PREMIUM PLUS 
■ All Premium features, including barcode scanning, now paired with full nutrition-focused meal planning 
■ Personalized meal plans, integrated grocery delivery & smart calorie, nutrition & macro tracking tools 
■ 1500+ healthy recipes tailored to your calorie, macro, nutrition & fitness goals

MyFitnessPal is the leading health and fitness tracking app to monitor your calorie, nutrition & macro intake to help conquer your health & fitness goals.

Download today & start your free Premium trial.

View our terms & conditions and privacy policy: 
https://www.myfitnesspal.com/terms-of-service
https://www.myfitnesspal.com/privacy-policy

result.summary: Track calories, macros & nutrition with AI. Log fitness, workouts & meals daily
result.developerLegalAddress: 100 Congress Ave Ste 400, Austin, TX 78701, United States
result.recentChanges: No major fixes or big changes to report, just tuning things up to keep the app running smoothly.
